overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game showing two characters on a stone wall overlooking a moonlit gothic castle across a lake. One character stands up and moves around briefly while clouds drift across the night sky. The atmosphere is serene with cool blue tones dominating the landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, serene perspective of a moonlit gothic landscape that shifts from a moment of shared stillness to subtle character movement. It begins with a wide view of a castle across a lake, where two characters sit quietly on a stone wall beneath a sky of drifting clouds. As the scene unfolds, the stillness is broken when one character stands up and moves along the wall while the other remains seated. The camera stays fixed throughout this transition, capturing the constant motion of the clouds and the steady glow of the castle windows against the cool blue night.
